docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $678.00 FILED BY KATSUS MELLISSA AS TO DEFENDANT BELL CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
CIVIL SUBPENA SERVED ON CHARLES BELL ON 5-16-92.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATSUS MELLISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL CHARLES $235.90 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $268.90, PLFT ALLOWED $200.00 FOR PAINT; $35.90 CARPET CLEANING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BELL CHARLES
